items.title: World Cup final watched by 15.8m people on BBC
items.summary: Spain's victory in Sunday's World Cup final attracts a peak audience of 15.8 million on BBC One and BBC iPlayer.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: R Ashwin points to selection bias, explains why Rohit and Virat are 'impossible to drop'
items.summary: Ravichandran Ashwin stated dropping Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli is nearly impossible. Their extraordinary achievements and immense fan following make them undroppable players....
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Ojha century, and Yashbardhan and Manal fifties rescue India Under-19
items.summary: Sri Lanka had reduced the visitors to 0 for 2, before Ojha and Yashbardhan added 122 for the third wicket
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
